hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'LangBackend\.Cli|\.fun[[:space:]]+-o|make[[:space:]]+(funlex|funyacc|test|all)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[LT Compiler] Binary: ../LangBackend/dist/LangBackend.Cli | Usage: LangBackend.Cli source.fun -o output | Makefile LBC already configured"}}'; fi; }
